title: × pachydopsis hortorum
intro: × Pachydipsis hortorum, also known as hairy balsam or hairy balsam senna, is a flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its potential to treat digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, due to its high concentration of anthraquinone glycosides. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and aiding in weight loss. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the × Pachydipsis hortorum plant are typically dried and made into tea, capsules, or tinctures for medicinal use.
